mechanism_summary: Both fuzzers share CMP_MAP gradient over the 16-bit Devanagari codepoint switch; value_profile wins because the I2S input-to-state substitution added by vpc does not help assemble the 0x0905-then-0x094X pair and its overhead and corpus churn degrade the vpc gradient.
one_line: I2S overhead and churn degrade VP gradient for nested 16-bit codepoint switch
